message.content:
{
  "analysis": "We have cached PDB FASTA/summary data and extracted DHFR. The remaining critical unknowns are: working FPbase endpoint/spectral data, verification of the ligand binder for the provided SMILES, and the antibody-target/binder sequence. We also need to assemble and codon-optimize the fusion while satisfying GC/length constraints.",
  "plan": "Run a robust Python script to:
1. Probe FPbase endpoints and common protein pages/scrapes for spectral peaks.
2. Query PDBe ligand/binding-site endpoints for all PDB IDs to identify the structure matching the target SMILES.
3. Query UniProt for the antibody target (ERBB2/HER2) and save/candidate-check sequences.
4. Save all collected data for inspection. This is the next concrete step needed before final donor/acceptor/binder selection.",
  "commands": [
    {
      "keystrokes": "cat > /app/verify_components.py <<'PY'
import urllib.request, urllib.parse, json, re, time, os

def fetch(url, timeout=12, headers=None, max_bytes=None):
    h={'User-Agent':'Mozilla/5.0','Accept':'application/json,text/html,*/*'}
    if headers: h.update(headers)
    req=urllib.request.Request(url, headers=h)
    with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=timeout) as r:
        data=r.read()
    return data[:max_bytes] if max_bytes else data

print('=== FPBASE ENDPOINT PROBE ===')
for url in [
 'https://www.fpbase.org/api/',
 'https://www.fpbase.org/api/3/proteins/',
 'https://www.fpbase.org/api/3.0/proteins/',
 'https://www.fpbase.org/api/4.0/proteins/',
 'https://www.fpbase.org/api/proteins/',
 'https://fpbase.org/api/3/proteins/',
 'https://fpbase.org/api/3.0/proteins/',
 'https://fpbase.org/api/proteins/',
]:
    try:
        d=fetch(url, max_bytes=300)
        print('OK', url, 'len', len(d), d[:120])
    except Exception as e:
        print('ERR', url, type(e).__name__, e)

print('\\n=== FPBASE PROTEIN PAGE PROBE ===')
for slug in ['mCherry','TagRFP','TagRFP675','Clover','mNeonGreen','EGFP','sfGFP','mOrange','PSmOrange','mCherry2']:
    try:
        html=fetch(f'https://www.fpbase.org/protein/{slug}/', max_bytes=20000).decode('utf-8','replace')
        # Extract title and some numeric peaks
        title=re.search(r'<title>(.*?)</title>', html)
        nums=re.findall(r'\\b(4\d\d|5\d\d|6\d\d|7\d\d)\\s*nm', html)
        ex=re.findall(r'Excit(?:ation)?[: ]*([0-9.]+)', html, re.I)
        em=re.findall(r'Emiss(?:ion)?[: ]*([0-9.]+)', html, re.I)
        print('PAGE', slug, 'title', title.group(1) if title else '', 'nums', nums[:20], 'ex', ex[:5], 'em', em[:5])
    except Exception as e:
        print('PAGE', slug, type(e).__name__, e)

print('\\n=== PDB LIGANDS ===')
ids=[x.strip() for x in open('/app/pdb_ids.txt') if x.strip()]
lig_data={}
smiles_target='Nc3nc(OCc1ccccc1)c2nc[nH]c2n3'
for pid in ids:
    for endpoint in [f'https://www.ebi.ac.uk/pdbe/api/pdb/entry/ligands/{pid.lower()}', f'https://www.ebi.ac.uk/pdbe/api/pdb/entry/binding_sites/{pid.lower()}']:
        try:
            d=json.loads(fetch(endpoint))
            txt=json.dumps(d)
            match=smiles_target.replace(' ','') in txt.replace(' ','')
            if match or '/BGC/' in txt or 'benzyl' in txt.lower() or 'guanine' in txt.lower():
                print('INTEREST', pid, endpoint, 'match', match, 'prefix', txt[:500])
            # Store compact ligand info
            if 'ligands' in endpoint and d:
                lig_data[pid]={}
                for k,v in d.items():
                    lig_data[pid][k]=v
        except Exception as e:
            pass
    time.sleep(0.02)
open('/app/pdb_ligands.json','w').write(json.dumps(lig_data,indent=1))

# Try RCSB chemical search for SMILES
print('\\n=== RCSB CHEMICAL SEARCH ===')
for url in [
 'https://www.rcsb.org/api/v1/chemical/search?smiles='+urllib.parse.quote(smiles_target)+'&search-type=smiles',
 'https://www.rcsb.org/api/v1/chemical/search?smiles='+urllib.parse.quote(smiles_target),
]:
    try:
        d=fetch(url, max_bytes=2000)
        print('OK', url, d[:500])
    except Exception as e:
        print('ERR', url, type(e).__name__, e)

print('\\n=== UNIPROT ERBB2 ===')
for uid in ['P04626','ERBB2']:
    try:
        d=fetch(f'https://rest.uniprot.org/uniprotkb/{uid}.fasta').decode()
        print('FASTA', uid, 'len', len(d), d[:300])
        open(f'/app/{uid}.fasta','w').write(d)
        # Extract canonical sequence
        seq=''.join(line.strip() for line in d.splitlines() if not line.startswith('>'))
        print('SEQLEN', len(seq), 'SEQPREFIX', seq[:80])
    except Exception as e:
        print('ERR', uid, type(e).__name__, e)

# Also search PDB API for ERBB2 to see available structures/binders
print('\\n=== RCSB ERBB2 STRUCTURES ===')
try:
    q=urllib.parse.quote('ERBB2')
    d=json.loads(fetch(f'https://www.rcsb.org/api/v1/structure/search?search_type=protein_sequence&query={q}&return_type=entry', max_bytes=1000))
    print(json.dumps(d)[:500])
except Exception as e:
    print('ERR RCSB ERBB2', type(e).__name__, e)
PY
python3 /app/verify_components.py > /tmp/verify_output.txt 2>&1
sed -n '1,60p' /tmp/verify_output.txt
echo '--- tail ---'
tail -80 /tmp/verify_output.txt
",
      "duration": 20.0
    }
  ]
}
